quests.name: Q9: Trial of the Labyrinth
quests.description: Only the marked effigies hold true statue fragments — the rest are decoys. Gather them, wake the altars and face Medusa.

objectives.description: Recover 4 statue fragments (search the Stone Effigies)
Slay Asterion (immune until you hold all fragments!)
Map 2: slay Ebikaros (immune until the altars burn!)
